# misp_feed (Data Source)

Look up a MISP feed by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "misp_feed" "example" {
  id = "5"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Numeric feed id.

### Read-Only

- `caching_enabled` (Boolean)
- `delta_merge` (Boolean)
- `distribution` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `fixed_event` (Boolean)
- `force_to_ids` (Boolean)
- `input_source` (String)
- `lookup_visible` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `orgc_id` (String)
- `override_ids` (Boolean)
- `provider_name` (String)
- `publish` (Boolean)
- `rules` (String)
- `sharing_group_id` (String)
- `source_format` (String)
- `tag_id` (String)
- `url` (String)
